name: nutanix-asim
description: Cribl pack for Nutanix Prism Central consolidated audit and CVM API audit events (local0 facility). Parses JSON audit messages, enriches with alertUid-based lookup for ASIM field mapping, MITRE ATT&CK enrichment, and security classification. Drops audit-alert_manager debug noise. Normalizes to Microsoft Sentinel ASIM AuditEvent schema with configurable output modes and data reduction.
author: Nathan Bray

parameters.name: output_mode
parameters.label: Output Mode
parameters.description: Controls output field set. 'asim_only' keeps only the 27 ASIM AuditEvent fields (maximum data reduction). 'enriched' keeps ASIM fields alongside all vendor-specific extracted fields.

parameters.name: raw_handling
parameters.label: Raw Event Handling
parameters.description: Control _raw field after field extraction. 'keep' preserves the original, 'truncate' keeps first 256 characters, 'remove' drops _raw entirely.

parameters.name: enable_mitre_enrichment
parameters.label: MITRE ATT&CK Enrichment
parameters.description: Control when MITRE ATT&CK fields are added. 'all' enriches every event, 'security_only' enriches only security-relevant events, 'off' disables MITRE enrichment.

parameters.name: event_filter
parameters.label: Event Filter
parameters.description: Filter events by category. 'all' emits everything. 'security' keeps only security alerts and config changes. 'operational' keeps only non-security operational events.

parameters.name: suppress_api_polling
parameters.label: Suppress API Polling
parameters.description: Suppress repetitive API GET polling from automated integrations (Dynatrace, monitoring). Deduplicates by user and endpoint over the suppression window.

parameters.name: api_suppression_window_sec
parameters.label: API Suppression Window (seconds)
parameters.description: Time window in seconds for API GET polling deduplication. Only applies when Suppress API Polling is enabled.
